name: Worker-Mode-for-Claude-Code
description: Worker Mode for Claude Code: a foreman identity protocol that shifts the main session's default instinct from doing to delegating. Ships a default PreToolUse hard-gate (force-delegate) that denies the orchestrator's own write/test-class tool calls and redirects them to subagents — allowing delegation, reads, light scheduling, and writes to scheduling outputs (state/progress/handoff). Set WORKER_FORCE_DELEGATE=off to revert to the original pure-incentive, zero-interception mode. Includes worker agents and delegation observability tools.

workerLogPath.description: Absolute path to the unified delegation worker-log jsonl file. plugin.json has no native required-config mechanism, so this requirement is enforced at runtime in two non-conflicting layers: the SessionStart hook (hooks/check-config.mjs) surfaces a NON-BLOCKING reminder via additionalContext if WORKER_LOG_PATH is unset or non-absolute (this config check never blocks the session — only the force-delegate hook gates tool calls, and only write/test-class ones), and record-worker.mjs hard-fails before writing a record if it is unset or non-absolute. This field documents the contract; the live value is read from the WORKER_LOG_PATH environment variable.
